{"id":"HAO:0000557","name":"mesopectus","def":"The sclerite that is U-shaped in cross section, connected anteriorly with the pronotum and the propectus, dorsally with the basalare, the mesonotum, the second axillary sclerite and the subalare, posteriorly with the metapectus and bears the mesodiscrimenal lamella and the mesofurca.","synonyms":[],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000909","name":"sclerite"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000583","target_name":"mesothorax"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000557","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000558","name":"mesophragma","def":"The phragma that extends along the ventral (posterior) margin of the ventral mesopostnotal flange and corresponds to the site of origin of the prophragmo-mesophragmal and the mesophragmo-metaphragmal muscles.","synonyms":[{"name":"deutophragma","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]},{"name":"middle phragma","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/68122"]},{"name":"phragma mediale","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]},{"name":"phragma mesothoracale","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]},{"name":"second phragma","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/68619","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/36895"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000716","name":"phragma"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000583","target_name":"mesothorax"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000558","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000559","name":"mesopleural carina","def":"The carina that crosses the mesopleuron and limits ventrally the femoral depression.","synonyms":[{"name":"sternaulus","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/37511"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000188","name":"carina"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000566","target_name":"mesopleuron"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000559","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000560","name":"mesopleural epicoxal sulcus","def":"The epicoxal sulcus that is located on the mesopleuron.","synonyms":[],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000296","name":"epicoxal sulcus"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000566","target_name":"mesopleuron"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000560","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000562","name":"mesopleural triangle","def":"The area that is limited dorsally by the subalar ridge, posteroventrally by the speculum and ends posteriorly in the subalar pit.","synonyms":[{"name":"anterior upper area of mesopleuron","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/36928","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/36895"]},{"name":"subalar triangle","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/36929","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/36895"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000146","name":"area"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000566","target_name":"mesopleuron"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000562","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000563","name":"mesopleuro-mesobasalar muscle","def":"The mesobasalar muscle that originates anteroventrally from the mesopleuron and insert on the mesobasalare.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesopleuro-mesobasalar","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]},{"name":"pl2-ba2","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001784","name":"mesobasalar muscle"}],"relationships":[{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000542","target_name":"mesobasalare"},{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000566","target_name":"mesopleuron"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000563","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000564","name":"mesopleuro-mesocoxal muscle","def":"The mesocoxal muscle that arises from the mesopleuron and inserts on the mesocoxa.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesopleuro-mesocoxal","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]},{"name":"pl2-cx2","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001786","name":"mesocoxal muscle"}],"relationships":[{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000635","target_name":"mid coxa"},{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000566","target_name":"mesopleuron"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000564","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

value: {"id":"HAO:0000565","name":"mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of hind wing muscle","def":"The hind wing third axillary muscle that arises from the mesopleuron and inserts on the third axillary sclerite of hind wing.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesopleuro-third axillary sclerite of hind wing","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]},{"name":"pl2-3ax2","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]},{"name":"pl2-3ax2bc","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001566","name":"hind wing third axillary muscle"}],"relationships":[{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0001631","target_name":"third axillary sclerite of the hind wing"},{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000566","target_name":"mesopleuron"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000565","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000566","name":"mesopleuron","def":"The area that is located laterally of the mesodiscrimen.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesopleurum","refs":["http://canacoll.org/Hym/Staff/Gibson/apss/chalglos.htm"]},{"name":"pleuron mesothoracale","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000146","name":"area"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000557","target_name":"mesopectus"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000566","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000567","name":"mesopostnotum","def":"The sclerite that bears the mesophragma and the mesolaterophragma.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesothoracic postnotum","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000909","name":"sclerite"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000883","target_name":"pterothorax"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000567","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000568","name":"mesopostscutellum","def":"The area that is located posteromedially on the  mesoscutellum, is delimited anteriorly by the posterior scutellar depression.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesoscutellar appendage","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/36874"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000146","name":"area"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000574","target_name":"mesoscutellum"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000568","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000569","name":"mesoscutal humeral sulcus","def":"The sulcus that extends medially along the parascutal carina and corresponds to a shallow ridge.","synonyms":[{"name":"humeral sulcus","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/68619","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/43472"]},{"name":"parascutal impression","refs":["DOI:10.108/00222930701579732","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"]},{"name":"parascutal sulcus","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/96325"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000978","name":"sulcus"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000575","target_name":"mesoscutum"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000569","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000570","name":"mesoscutal suprahumeral sulcus","def":"The sulcus that extends along the anterior margin of the mesoscutum between the anterior-most point of the preaxilla and the anteroadmedian line and corresponds to the vertical lobe of the mesoscutum.","synonyms":[{"name":"suprahumeral sulcus","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/68619","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/43472"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000978","name":"sulcus"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000575","target_name":"mesoscutum"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000570","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000572","name":"mesoscutellar-axillar complex","def":"The area that is located posteriorly of the transscutal line and is composed of the axillae and the mesoscutellum.","synonyms":[{"name":"scutellar-axillar complex","refs":["http://canacoll.org/Hym/Staff/Gibson/apss/chalglos.htm","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/96325"]},{"name":"scutellum","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/43472"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0000146","name":"area"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000556","target_name":"mesonotum"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000572","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000573","name":"mesoscutello-metanotal muscle","def":"The metanotal muscle that arises from the mesonotum and inserts on the metanotum.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesonoto-metanotal muscle","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001718","name":"metanotal muscle"}],"relationships":[{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000603","target_name":"metanotum"},{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000556","target_name":"mesonotum"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000573","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000574","name":"mesoscutellum","def":"The scutellum that is located on the mesonotum.","synonyms":[{"name":"scutellum","refs":["http://canacoll.org/Hym/Staff/Gibson/apss/chalglos.htm","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/68619","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98054"]},{"name":"scutellum mesothoracale","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001229","name":"scutellum"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000572","target_name":"mesoscutellar-axillar complex"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000574","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000575","name":"mesoscutum","def":"The scutum that is located on the mesonotum.","synonyms":[{"name":"dorsolum","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98054"]},{"name":"scutopraescutum","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]},{"name":"scutum","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/68619","http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/36874"]},{"name":"scutum mesothoracale","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/98094"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001676","name":"scutum"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000556","target_name":"mesonotum"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000575","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000578","name":"mesosterno-mesocoxal muscle","def":"The mesocoxal muscle that originates at least partly from the mesodiscrimenal lamella and inserts on the mesocoxa.","synonyms":[{"name":"mesosterno-mesocoxal","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]},{"name":"s2-cx2","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001786","name":"mesocoxal muscle"}],"relationships":[{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000557","target_name":"mesopectus"},{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000635","target_name":"mid coxa"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000578","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000579","name":"mesosterno-procoxal muscle","def":"The procoxal muscle that arises anteriorly from the mesodiscrimenal lamella and inserts posteriorly on the procoxa.","synonyms":[{"name":"prospinasterno-procoxal muscle","refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67864"]}],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001113","name":"procoxal muscle"}],"relationships":[{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0001122","target_name":"procoxa"},{"type":"HAO:attached_to","target_id":"HAO:0000557","target_name":"mesopectus"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000579","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}

{"id":"HAO:0000583","name":"mesothorax","def":"The thoracic segment that is located between the prothorax and the metathorax and is delimited by the mesopectus and the mesonotum.","synonyms":[],"is_a":[{"id":"HAO:0001013","name":"thoracic segment"}],"relationships":[{"type":"BFO:0000050","target_id":"HAO:0000883","target_name":"pterothorax"}],"xrefs":[],"is_obsolete":false,"comment":"","chinese_name":"汉译HAO:0000583","phonetic":"/null/","def_refs":["http://api.hymao.org/api/ref/67791"],"source":"hao"}
